notes: Long multi-topic session (589 events, 52 user turns): user requests a blog post comparing Dedupe.io vs Golden Suite on NPPES data, pivots through benchmark design (dataset choice, tool choice, sample size), lands on CCMS cluster comparison + sensitivity analysis as the honest angle without ground truth, then writes spec + plan through the superpowers:brainstorming / writing-plans / spec-reviewer loop. Three distinct architectural concepts: (1) the benchmark design itself, (2) the CCMS-based comparison methodology that avoids needing ground truth, (3) the iterative spec-review loop pattern. Forbidden slugs are operational noise — an unrelated memory-file update the assistant made about resource-intensive runs.
